title: Produce full operator MAP system report
description: Produce a comprehensive operator-facing report on the MAP system after TASK-063: what works, what does not, why, how to fix it, what to add, what to change, and prioritized next steps. Deliver a durable MAP artifact and a Desktop copy for command-center.
acceptance_criteria: Use TASK-063 and supporting emergence/repo-drift audit artifacts as inputs
Explain what works, what fails, root causes, fixes, additions, changes, and priorities
Include recent emergence/insight usage and lifecycle findings
Create a readable report artifact and deliver a copy to the Desktop if permission is granted
Run relevant MAP validators before reporting completion
